adrRefs.note: Family roadmap present on main. Fleet-scoped video-reader North Star ADR file (ADR-N-fleet-video-reader-mcp-rust-north-star.md) is NOT on main — prior PR #11 title claimed ADR but only landed a contaminated ledger.

inventoryNotes: TICK024 decontamination: ledger rebuilt from origin/main source (src/index.ts tools map + crates/video-reader-mcp-server tool_router + bin/video-reader-mcp). Prior ledger was a mechanical rename of SylphxAI/pdf-reader-mcp and claimed tool/read_pdf|search_pdf|pdf_evidence paths that do not exist in this repo. Fail-closed: no parity_proven, no authority_rust, no ts_deleted, no promotions.

capabilities.notes: On origin/main (6efac6e) Rust mcp-server main.rs is stdio-only; crates/video-reader-mcp-server/src/http_transport.rs is ABSENT. Open PR #10 (feat/rust-web-mcp-http-transport) adds Rust Streamable HTTP — not merged; do not claim rust_impl until merge + proof. Fail-closed ts_only.

proof.staleReason: TICK024: Rust stdio rmcp present on main and is default bin path, but no SHA-bound differential harness on main (scripts/run-video-reader-differential.sh ABSENT). proof.status missing — NO promotion.

promotionHold.reason: rej-010 + TICK024 decontamination — rust_impl on disk only; differential_green required before parity_proven/authority_rust

capabilities.prodProbe: benchmark:release-gate; bin/video-reader-mcp default (Rust when native staged)
capabilities.notes: bin/video-reader-mcp defaults to Rust native video-reader-mcp-server; VIDEO_READER_MCP_TRANSPORT=ts opts into TS. SHA-bound differential harness not on main.

Opt-in TS stdio MCP adapter via VIDEO_READER_MCP_TRANSPORT=ts (or bin arg ts). Deletion gates/scripts (check-ts-adapter-deletion-ready.sh, check-no-ts-stdio-backend.sh) ABSENT on main. ts_deleted NOT claimed (rej-001).

decontamination.notes: Denominator drop 6→5 is intentional contamination remediation (pdf-domain tools never existed here). Control-plane sealed baseline must re-seal after product merge — not a silent regression.

promotionFreeze.reason: TICK024 decontamination + rej-010 — 0 capabilities with differential_green or canary_green; no promotions

postMergeGate.notes: ts_deleted for transport/stdio-ts-adapter blocked until deletion PR + prod smoke (rej-001). Rust HTTP authority blocked until PR #10 merge + differential proof. differential_green required before parity_proven/authority_rust (rej-010).

S1-tools.notes: tool/read_video + tool/video_evidence rust_impl on main. No differential harness on main.

S2-stdio-rust-default.notes: Default bin launches Rust rmcp stdio when native present; TS opt-in via VIDEO_READER_MCP_TRANSPORT=ts.

S3-http-rust.notes: Rust HTTP transport only on open PR #10. Main TS HTTP remains ts_only.
